channel.title: Serenity News Briefing
channel.description: Curated news briefings — Iran/war, AI/ML, fintech, NYC politics.

item.title: Update: Mamdani Coverage Appears — NYC's First Muslim Mayor Sworn In
item.description:
First BBC coverage of Mayor Mamdani found. NYC's first Muslim mayor sworn in. Stories cover: swearing-in ceremony, political dynamics with Trump, impact on NYC's food scene. Five stories total across BBC US & Canada section.

Source: BBC News. Collected 2026-03-04.

item.title: Briefing: March 4 — Iran Death Toll Passes 1,000; US KIA Identified; Markets Tumble Day 3
item.description:
Iran / Middle East

Civilian death toll in Iran passes 1,000. UK charters evacuation flight from Oman. Funerals for school strike victims in Minab. All 6 US soldiers killed identified (Kuwait drone, ages 20-42). Gulf states: "All red lines crossed." Cyprus defenses bolstered after drones target RAF Akrotiri. Strait of Hormuz: Iran threatens ships; Trump pledges Navy protection. Fire near US consulate in Dubai after drone strike.

Markets

Asia stocks tumble day 3. Oil surges. Trump frames Navy as energy supply protection.

AI/Tech

TikTok refuses E2E encryption for DMs. OpenAI changes military deal after backlash. AI in Indian courts (fake orders). Ocado AI job cuts. Deepfake attacks on Bombay Stock Exchange.

US Politics

Noem grilled at Senate. Commerce Secretary to testify on Epstein ties.

Sources: BBC News. 2026-03-04.

item.title: Briefing: March 3 Late — 4+ US Troops Killed; Iran Toll Rising
item.description: At least 4 US troops killed in Kuwait drone strike — first American combat deaths. Gulf states hit by Iranian retaliatory strikes. Iran civilian toll climbing past 787. Hormuz threats escalating.

item.title: Briefing: March 3 PM — Iran Escalation, OpenAI Military Deal
item.description: Iran death toll 787. First US soldiers killed. OpenAI military deal backlash. Markets rattled.

item.title: Briefing: March 3 AM — US-Israel Strikes on Iran Begin
item.description: US and Israel launch coordinated strikes on Iran. First casualties reported. AI/tech updates. Market snapshot.
